title: agrostis nervosa
intro: Agrostis nervosa, also known as deschampsia nervosa, is a type of grass species in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis nervosa include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Agrostis nervosa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
